_comment: Config for the twice-daily X scan. Edit handles/searches here, not in the scheduled-task prompt. Read by _tools/x_scan/x_scan_state.py and referenced by _prompts/X Scan Prompt.md.

accounts.name: Serenity
accounts.note: best ideas are often subscribe-to-unlock; capture the visible teaser + ticker, mark [paywalled]

accounts.name: SemiAnalysis (firm)
accounts.role: institutional feed; carries Doug O'Laughlin + team research

accounts.name: Doug O'Laughlin (Fabricated Knowledge)
accounts.note: located 2026-06-07 via fabricated_knowledge standing search; was retired @Mule_Capital

retired_accounts.name: Doug O'Laughlin (Fabricated Knowledge)
retired_accounts.status: dead/renamed; new personal handle not locatable as of 2026-06-02

retired_accounts.name: Jukan (memory/HBM)
retired_accounts.status: account deleted/renamed; no findable successor as of 2026-06-02

standing_searches.label: Leopold Aschenbrenner / Situational Awareness holdings
standing_searches.anchor_account: search the person; prefer the actual filing + reputable press over hype accounts
standing_searches.treat_as: VIEW/unverified; only weights/positions corroborated by SEC 13F/13G or major press become FACT

standing_searches.label: Trump chip/AI/tariff market-movers
standing_searches.include_only: chip/AI/semi policy, tariffs, govt stakes, federal chip/quantum awards, ticker-moving comments

standing_searches.label: Memory / HBM (replaces @Jukanlosreve)
standing_searches.treat_as: VIEW unless tied to a filing/press

standing_searches.label: Doug O'Laughlin / Fabricated Knowledge mentions (locate successor handle)
standing_searches.purpose: surface his current handle if he resurfaces; if a clear personal account is found, add it to accounts[] and drop this search

exclude_note: these are engagement-bait / pump / pure-politics accounts seen flooding the standing searches; paraphrase only if a claim is independently corroborated, else omit
earnings_sources: Pinned 'Next week in earnings' calendar from @TheTranscript_
WebSearch: '<next 2 trading days> semiconductor AI earnings calendar' and 'TSMC / AVGO / MRVL / earnings date'
